response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio matches the reference lyrics provided in the JSON, but with the correct performer identified as Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame for the dramatic song portion. 
2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for lyric and dialogue matching, while correcting character speaker details.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned with each spoken phrase, dividing overlapping dialogue for Gigi and Raora in the car scene, and synchronizing Cecilia's gaming reactions and Elizabeth's dramatic singing.

subtitles.original: Raora, what are you doing? You don't know how to drive a car?
subtitles.english: Raora, what are you doing? You don't know how to drive a car?

subtitles.original: Put your foot on... on the gas pedal!
subtitles.english: Put your foot on... on the gas pedal!

subtitles.original: There is a horse in front of us!
subtitles.english: There is a horse in front of us!

subtitles.original: Oh my god, there is a horse!
subtitles.english: Oh my god, there is a horse!

subtitles.original: Oh, a horse is right there! Oh my god!
subtitles.english: Oh, a horse is right there! Oh my god!

subtitles.original: Oh, we must... we must get out of here now!
subtitles.english: Oh, we must... we must get out of here now!

subtitles.original: Hurry, Gigi! We might be able to buy...
subtitles.english: Hurry, Gigi! We might be able to buy...

subtitles.original: No, we might miss the limited edition Satini!
subtitles.english: No, we might miss the limited edition Satini!

subtitles.original: If I missed it, I'm gonna die!
subtitles.english: If I missed it, I'm gonna die!

subtitles.original: Wait, wait, wait, wait, wait! Horses like vegetables, right?
subtitles.english: Wait, wait, wait, wait, wait! Horses like vegetables, right?

subtitles.original: I think there's a cucumber in the trunk.
subtitles.english: I think there's a cucumber in the trunk.

subtitles.original: Why do you have a cucumber in your pocket right now?
subtitles.english: Why do you have a cucumber in your pocket right now?

subtitles.original: Gigi Murin, you know I hate cucumbers.
subtitles.english: Gigi Murin, you know I hate cucumbers.

subtitles.original: Why do you have cucumbers right now?
subtitles.english: Why do you have cucumbers right now?

subtitles.original: You know where I'm going to put that cucumber?
subtitles.english: You know where I'm going to put that cucumber?

subtitles.original: Get out of here right now! I don't want to see the cucumber.
subtitles.english: Get out of here right now! I don't want to see the cucumber.

subtitles.original: What about the... what about for the horse?
subtitles.english: What about the... what about for the horse?

subtitles.original: Oh, you hate me! Don't you freaking hate me?
subtitles.english: Oh, you hate me! Don't you freaking hate me?

subtitles.original: No, you hate me! So you hate me?
subtitles.english: No, you hate me! So you hate me?

subtitles.original: So you hate me? Just say it! Tell me!
subtitles.english: So you hate me? Just say it! Tell me!

subtitles.original: You know how I feel! Why did you bring cucumbers?
subtitles.english: You know how I feel! Why did you bring cucumbers?

subtitles.original: Why do you have cucumbers right now?
subtitles.english: Why do you have cucumbers right now?

subtitles.original: I hate cucumbers! I hate the taste! Everything about cucumbers!
subtitles.english: I hate cucumbers! I hate the taste! Everything about cucumbers!

subtitles.original: Those two are away with the fairies.
subtitles.english: Those two are away with the fairies.

subtitles.original: Do you have any updates on the suspects' location?
subtitles.english: Do you have any updates on the suspects' location?

subtitles.original: I missed! Look what you did, Liz!
subtitles.english: I missed! Look what you did, Liz!

subtitles.original: You ruined my perfect score! I was so close!
subtitles.english: You ruined my perfect score! I was so close!

subtitles.original: Did I fail them as a mother?
subtitles.english: Did I fail them as a mother?

subtitles.original: My heart breaks as their big sister.
subtitles.english: My heart breaks as their big sister.

subtitles.original: I've done everything in my power to look after those three...
subtitles.english: I've done everything in my power to look after those three...

subtitles.original: ...and guide them to this very day.
subtitles.english: ...and guide them to this very day.

subtitles.original: Oh, what did I do to deserve such cruelty?
subtitles.english: Oh, what did I do to deserve such cruelty?

subtitles.original: Where did my guidance stray away from the path?
subtitles.english: Where did my guidance stray away from the path?

subtitles.original: You guys are still... still there, huh?
subtitles.english: You guys are still... still there, huh?

subtitles.original: I promise I'll be a good girl.
subtitles.english: I promise I'll be a good girl.

subtitles.original: It's just allergies. I'm not crying, you're crying.
subtitles.english: It's just allergies. I'm not crying, you're crying.

subtitles.original: We love you! Big sister! We love you!
subtitles.english: We love you! Big sister! We love you!

subtitles.original: It's the thief who stole the Ultimate Justice Statue!
subtitles.english: It's the thief who stole the Ultimate Justice Statue!

subtitles.original: We're going to kill them! Kill them! Kill them!
subtitles.english: We're going to kill them! Kill them! Kill them!

subtitles.original: Hey, you! Hold it right there!
subtitles.english: Hey, you! Hold it right there!

subtitles.original: Because of you, I missed out on unlimited editions of Satini and I didn't even get to eat my delicious pizza!
subtitles.english: Because of you, I missed out on unlimited editions of Satini and I didn't even get to eat my delicious pizza!

subtitles.original: How are you going to take responsibility for this?
subtitles.english: How are you going to take responsibility for this?

subtitles.original: That sounds like a 'you' problem. Go eat your pizza now.
subtitles.english: That sounds like a 'you' problem. Go eat your pizza now.

subtitles.original: Oh, by the way, there's a shop nearby famous for its cucumber pizza. It's to die for.
subtitles.english: Oh, by the way, there's a shop nearby famous for its cucumber pizza. It's to die for.

subtitles.original: Even I've had it before. Absolutely exquisite.
subtitles.english: Even I've had it before. Absolutely exquisite.

subtitles.original: Oh, this is... Haaah... This is such an insult!
subtitles.english: Oh, this is... Haaah... This is such an insult!

subtitles.original: It's okay, it's okay, Raora. Please, relax, relax.
subtitles.english: It's okay, it's okay, Raora. Please, relax, relax.

subtitles.original: And now, it's time to introduce Justice's 2nd Anniversary Merch!
subtitles.english: And now, it's time to introduce Justice's 2nd Anniversary Merch!

subtitles.original: First, take a look at this!
subtitles.english: First, take a look at this!

subtitles.original: We spoke with someone who actually used it.
subtitles.english: We spoke with someone who actually used it.
